name: Pixel Realms
author: Poki
description: Pixel Realms is an idle/management game where you carve your path through mysterious pixel realms! Engage in diverse activities, from cutting grass and chopping trees to milking cows, harvesting vegetables, battling monsters, and beyond. As you collect all kinds of resources, you get to unlock new areas and reveal more of the realms! Grow your skills and see the world expanding alongside your journey. Are you ready to uncover every inch of the Pixel Realms? How to play Pixel Realms? Use the arrow keys, WASD, or click and drag with the mouse to move around! Who created Pixel Realms? Pixel Realms is created by Yury Grigoryev. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Pixel Realms for free? You can play Pixel Realms for free on Poki. Can I play Pixel Realms on mobile devices and desktop? Pixel Realms can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
